headline: TERRIBLE TELEPHONE CUSTOMER  SUPPORT…
review_content: TERRIBLE TELEPHONE CUSTOMER  SUPPORT FOR ONLINE ORDERS!!! The in-store experience at walmart is always excellent, but Heaven help you if you ever need assistance with on order placed online! walmart’s telephone customer service for online orders is absolutely pathetic! You will wait on the phone FOREVER to reach a live voice, only to find out that the live voice cannot speak English well enough to be understood! That’s because they answer in the Philippines (outsourcing is an insult to workers here in the USA), and to make things even worse, the phone reps are poorly trained! It took three tries to finally get through to a “specialist” (the reps pretend there are no supervisors present). On the first two calls the reps hung up when we asked for a supervisor because we simply could not understand their broken English. When we did reach the specialist on the third try, she lied and did not follow through on what she promised to do. All in all, a total of THREE HOURS was wasted on the phone with walmart’s phone customer NON-service! We were forced to go to the store in person for face-to-face customer service. At the store, a pleasant young man named Kyle gave us excellent service. Kyle was efficient, courteous, and quickly rectified the problem. Thank you, Kyle. We were about ready to stop using walmart forever because of the absolutely horrible experience we had with that attempted online order. Shame on Clarissa, that online specialist who did not follow through on the promises she made on the phone, and shame on the three individuals on the phone who preceded her – the three who most obviously did not care at all. Our shipment had to be delivered to the store (instead of to our home address) in order to get the two $5.00 walmart gift cards. Even though we clearly selected our local store in Pennsylvania, the order wound up being delivered to Minnesota instead! What should have been an easy fix with the very first person involved on the phone turned into a painfully long ordeal! But no one on the phone cared enough to fix the problem correctly - not even that lying "specialist" Clarissa! So, "two thumbs up," and many kudos to Kyle at the Stroudsburg, PA store for quickly and properly taking care of us. In fact, it is only because of Kyle’s excellent customer service that we will now continue to shop at walmart stores (we have been long-term customers) - but NEVER, ever will we consider placing an online order again at walmart.com.

headline: Ordered items on Black Friday and was…
review_content: Ordered items on Black Friday and was out of town for Thanksgiving. Came back to find out that they change their hold policy from 11/15 - 12/1 from 7 days to 2 days (only store that I have found to do this) and my items were cancelled. I contacted their chat CS and they stated I would not be charged since the items were cancelled. Low and behold, the next day I was charged for these items. Now instead of a refund, they are trying to give me a walmart gift card. Since I am not shopping there anymore, don't want a gift card. Called CS and they said their website states that they cannot refund PayPal payments on cancellations. Went back to the website and it states that they do not refund returns, but nothing about cancellations, which are both separated in their policy. They stated that didn't matter, that I would have to wait 30 days for a PayPal refund.  So they went from, it is not possible to refund PayPal payments to it will take 30 days. Also, while dealing with CS, was hung up on twice, and wait times were about 20 minutes originally and each time I called back. Definitely my last transaction with walmart.

headline: Customer Service to the Rescue
review_content: I purchased a mini beverage refrigerator online.  When I opened the packaging, the refrigerator door was broken off of the unit and the housing had several dents in it. I called customer service and they arranged for a pick-up at my door. headline: Two days really means two weeks
review_content: The first experience ordering from walmart online was great. I ordered on a Sunday, and the stuff arrived on Tuesday. I was so impressed that I immediately ordered more stuff on the following Sunday. Everything I selected said 2-day shipping, and the order was estimated to arrive Wednesday. On Wednesday, I receive several different emails telling me that part of my order will be delayed, and that it may take until December 12th to arrive when I ordered on November 25th. Then the following couple of days I receive more emails telling me specific items have shipped, and yet when I go to track them all it says is that the shipping label was created. Are you kidding me? Every day is April 1st at walmart HQ it seems. walmart doesn't seem to know the difference between two days and two weeks. Guess I'll be going back to Walmart, as this is without any doubt the worse online ordering experience I've ever had.

I was told there were exceptions/exclusions to the price adjustment policy. Since when?!?! I’ve never experienced this from walmart. I checked online this morning when I called & it didn’t say that my items were excluded in the fine print. I called back after work & spoke with a supervisor in the evening. He reiterated that he can’t adjust the price due to these items I purchased being part of the exclusion. He said to go online & read the fine print. In a matter of a day, they added this exclusion policy to the website!! I let the supervisor know that I KNOW it didn’t say that before. He responds that they had to add it online since many customers called about the same thing since it was a well sought after item. That shows how many people they lied to & stole money from! Disgusting. Go to Walmart.

headline: "We take your money....do you really expect us to deliver?"
review_content: I ordered a sofa from this company and I paid an extra $15 for delivery inside my door. I received a message from their delivery company to say that I would receive my sofa today (16th November) between 8am and 6 pm and the delivery method was to leave it outside. I contacted both the delivery company and walmart to get this changed as in my sales contract. The delivery company were very apologetic but told me that walmart had obviously misinformed them and they could not deliver into my home. walmart told me that the delivery vehicle was contacting the driver to make sure he delivered inside the house. The delivery arrived and the driver wanted to leave the sofa on the pathway outside the block. He wouldn't entertain delivering it inside the door. As the item was 151 pounds in weight and I am handicapped, I had no alternative but to reject the delivery. Five minutes later, the delivery company phoned to say that the sofa would be delivered inside my door. I told the agent what had happened and he called his delivery 'hub' which informed him that the delivery wouldn't take place. Another call to walmart to request a refund and this was sorted out eventually. walmart did not once apologise to me. I have spent my entire day waiting for this delivery to find that walmart let me down big style and not even a 'sorry'. Wild horses wouldn't tempt me to do business with this company again. My experience and other experiences on this site and the bad ratings lead me to believe that walmart are a 'shareholder focused' only company. Their customers don't seem to come into the equation as far as excellent service is concerned. As long as we part with our money, that's fine but don't expect an apology when we get it wrong - because really, we don't care!!!

headline: Over an hour of my life I'll never ever get back
review_content: I used to love walmart, but the love is most definitely gone. I may still shop in their store but I will NEVER buy anything online again.  After moving across the country, I had something delivered accidentally to an old address. I shop online all the time and over the course of seven months, this happened only twice. Both relatively small purchases (less than $100). The first time it was w/ DSW and it was so simple. A five minute phone call w /an awesome customer service agent and everything was fixed and my sandals were on their way to my new address.  Oh, not so with walmart.  A hour later, after being hung up on once, given all sorts of completely unintelligible explanations, I am still not sure exactly what has happened.  I think I've received a partial refund, and may get another refund (?) after the second part of the order is delivered to the wrong address.  Maybe not, though, because we'll have to create a "case number."  Maybe, but I cannot get a straight answer and they will not or cannot (??) send me my items at the correct address. They cannot resolve the issue.  They just want to give me a case number so I can call back and be on hold for god only knows how  long again in the future.  Now, if this were a large purchase, I would totally understand, but we're talking less than 50 bucks.  How much of an "investigation" into this do we need to conduct walmart?  No thanks.  I realized this is my fault (I changed my local store, but not my mailing address), so I am okay with having to reorder these items myself.  I would even be okay just eating the money, honestly. These phone calls with customer service, though, have pretty much left me unwilling to ever set foot in a walmart store or shop with them online again.  Thank goodness I didn't buy anything expensive.  I'll just consider this an $88 lesson learned and make my online purchases other places.  I don't care if I ever see my money or my items at this point.  Bravo DSW!  Boo, walmart.

headline: Won't refund after item returned....sending debt collection letters
review_content: Well, I purchased a dinning set which came damaged. I contacted the maker and they did not respond or help. I contacted walmart for a replacement and return. The replacement was delivered to the wrong house downstairs. I contacted walmart and they told me just over over their, open the package while it's standing up and take out a piece at a time for the ones I need to replace. This box was 3 times my width and taker than me. Weights about my weight. I am not taking that risk. The box said lay flat before opening. walmart just said too bad. I then called and they just said they will come and pick up both package, the damaged on and the one that is delivered to the wrong place and refund me. Well, they did not refund me at all. I called, chatted, shown delivery proof and was told they have a system. They need to transfer my case to the investigation team, then the research team, then the specialist team and then to processing and such, then refund. Well, they never even transferred my case to any team when a week later I contacted them again. The chat rep told me to just contact my bank. I did and it took weeks more plus a complaint to the BBB for walmart to refund me. Then they sent me a collection letter telling me I owe them the money. I contacted my bank and was told they are still under investigation and need walmart to contact them directly as I have hand the case over to my bank. Well, walmart just won't and keep sending debt collection letters with threat of me not being able to use my RED card again and such. So to avoid any hit on my credit and stuff, I have to send in another payment that I do not owe to walmart. Hopefully it's a learning lesson and when this clears, I will cancel the RED card. I started using because I gave up on Walmart, but sadly this year, Walmart online has beat walmart new "improved" system for sure. The 5% off on Red card is for sure not worth the trouble. I since then I have do all my shopping mainly on Amazon. The comfort of having decent/good customer services helps me more than a few dollars discount. So beware if you buy anything expensive and large from walmart that comes damaged, it's like giving birth each time you contact them.

Call was disconnected after spending a lot of time trying to explain the difference between UPS and USPS to her.  Called back again to have them pick up dresser.  Talked at length and got nowhere with the second person.  Call was disconnected again.  I called a third person and explained the situation AGAIN and that person told me to call the next day.  In all, I spent 2 hours on the phone talking to three "not a clue" people, hung  up twice and still not resolved.  Finally thought to take packages (weighing 140 pounds and two 40 pound) to local store.  Easy and friendly to deal with locals.  Worst customer service for on-line products and no quality control.  Never again!

headline: I placed a large clothing order at…
review_content: I placed a large clothing order at walmart.com, which arrived promptly (with 1 item sent in the wrong color).  Two days later, everything went on sale for 20% off.  They refused to do a price adjustment when I called the main customer service #, and told me I'd have to go to the store and return everything and then place a new order to get the 20% off.   Nearest store - 90 miles round trip!  Not only did this cost me greatly in time and frustration - and on a work day yet, but I did place the order again, and with free shipping, that means walmart paid to ship these clothes to me TWICE!   Not to mention the time of the employee in the store who had to refund each item I returned.   It was a lose-lose situation.  walmart is very disrespectful of a customer's time and is out of touch with common sense.  Also, the clothes ALL came smelling like formaldehyde!!!  I liked some of the clothes, but I'm reading where it's very difficult to get rid of that unhealthy chemical when it's in the clothes -- not like it just comes out on the 1st wash.   I'm fed up with this store, and may return everything on my new order and call it quits with this organization.

headline: I came to walmart to buy 4 cans of…
review_content: I came to walmart to buy 4 cans of Lotrimin.  I had 4 manufacturer coupons printed from the Lotrimin site.  I additionally added about 50.00 worth of other I hadn't planned on buying.  I followed walmart policy and the coupons policy.  (walmart only allows 4 coupons for the same product and Lotrimin only allows the same coupon to be used 4 times in one purchase).  I get to the checkout, the coupon doesn't scan- Lotrimin coupons have a history of not scanning.  In the past, clerks just over-rided it through.  This clerk calls a low level manager over.  Out of the kindness of his heart he allowed one coupon to go through.  I called customer service from the parking lot.  It seemed everything was ok and the customer service agent told me he couldn't do anything for me unless I was in the store.  Luckily I was still in the parking lot.  35 minutes later, I still hadn't had anything accomplished but a 5.00 gift card which doesn't help for me purchasing the Lotrimin right now.  I had to hand my phone over to the low level manager and waste minutes on my phone and time in my life.  After all of this I was told that when a coupon doesn't ring, management doesn't have to take it.  I wasted 35 minutes for that.   So, now the Cary walmart on Walnut St gets a bad Trustpilot review, gets blasted on my facebook page, I returned 50.00 worth of merchandise, and they lost another 20.00 with the lotrimin sale.   I won't shop at this walmart again, and as soon as my accumulated gift cards are used up, I won't shop walmart again.  I have been an avid walmart shopper, have their debit card and spend several hundred a month there in groceries and other odd items.  My question to walmart, was this worth the 4.50 in coupon and the young manager self satisfaction in saying "no?"   You lost a customer and in a tight market where you are not doing as well as you would like, was it worth it?

I went ahead and emailed them right away hoping for a reply or a reason for cancelling my orders (they accept international cards according to their chat support, so that's not the issue at all). I emailed them more than 3 days ago and now im sure I won't hear back from them at all and the deal that I was interested in ended 2 days ago. What a terrible experience.

headline: Brian Cornell = bad CEO for walmart Corp.
review_content: Up to the day when Brian Cornell became CEO of walmart Corp it was a great business with a unique and pleasant culture. Mr. Cornell's job, as he sees it, is to please the stockholders first and foremost and make the bottom line look good, so he sold off the pharmacy, their credit cards operations, sold off a lot of parking lot space but worst of all, he began skimping on job training. In the old days, new employees were not allowed to interact with customers for 30 days; now they move right in behind the cash register and all too often it is painfully obvious that they haven't seen any training in how to interact with people in a friendly way. Why doesn't the board fire this guy before he ruins yet another company?

headline: Unable to process order
review_content: After about 30-40 minutes trying to place an order wherein I tried to place my order online via my credit card # but walmart's website kept sending me around in circles--they asked for cc #, then security code, then cc # again --this went on and on.  This is despite that they already had this information.  Finally giving up I tried calling customer service-- yes, the woman I spoke with was polite but couldn't help so she transferred me.  (BTW: this contact person said I could use my Redcard to purchase items online but she couldn't get the order processed when she tried to use it, and other "google" searches said that, online, it was only good for free shipping.)   Anyway, this didn't help.  To the contrary  they wanted to send me back to the first group of people who tried to help me.  I don't know why this was such a mess.  I have an almost perfect credit score, and was willing to use either my Redcard or Visa card to get this transaction done but that didn't happen and I finally gave up.  I can only conclude that walmart either doesn't have the funds, or is unwilling to spend them. to make their online experience worthwhile.

headline: I had ordered the overcast color of a …
review_content: I had ordered the overcast color of a TV Stand from walmart online before Christmas with guaranteed delivery before C/Day. For some reason, the system generated a wrong color and I received it in a different color (navy blue). That was supposed to be our part of nursery collection for a scheduled Christmas baby and was disappointed to find a color we did not want. So I called walmart customer support, who offered me a discount for the replacement order. I accepted that offer, however, I was asked to pay separately for the replacement and walmart could not issue me even store credit for the return right away to get my replacement. Since it was a heavy piece of furniture, I opted for a home pick up of the product for return. walmart customer support gave me a confirmation for pick up by UPS. I waited for one week for a courier to show up for pick up and no one did. I called UPS about the issue but they stated that they don't have any information.

headline: I ordered an ipad this year on Dec 24 …
review_content: I ordered an ipad this year on Dec 24 to ship to a store nearby. It says the item will arrive Dec 29-Jan 2. Since I am only on a trip here until the 2nd, I figured that would give it just enough time. BUT NO. The website sneakily updated the arrival date to Jan 4 a few days later. I called customer service to ask where the ipad was, and nobody seemed to have an idea. I said I would not be able to pick up after Jan 2, the staff offered to re-order a new ipad for me honoring my original price (it was on sale during christmas) and ship to Hong Kong for me for free. Great. Then I had to talk to two more people of different departments, only to be told that since they don't ship digital items internationally anymore, there's no way they can do that for me. I asked if I can get any reimbursement in one form of another for my lose (shipping to HK by a friend) and the frustration in all this, she just flat out rejected me. Really? This is the shittest retail store there ever is on earth. Big fat corporate mongol lying and stealing hard-earned money from our pockets. I wish they go bankrupt ASAP. NEVER SHOP THERE, unless you want a load of troubles and have extra cash to drop.

headline: Don't purchase a Total Wireless phone at walmart …
review_content: Purchased a Total Wireless phone on Cyber Monday at the Champagne, IL walmart Store.  The Cyber Monday special was not available for online purchase, which should have been my first red flag.  But needed a phone ASAP, due to my current phone had stopped working that morning.  I drove to the store to pick up the online/cyber Monday special (which was over 50 miles away), to only find out when I got home that the phone was not activated by the cashier.  I called them immediately and they requested that I drive back to the store to have them try to ring it up again.  I could not drive the extra 100 miles that they were asking me to drive, so I offered to send it to them through UPS with a return label for them to ship it back to me.  After far too many calls to check on the status of the phone, I found out that the person that signed for the package, did not get it to management or even the person that was named in care of the package.  This also meant that the return label had disappeared, and the manager had already mentioned that he did not have the ability to ship anything from the store.  He promised to resolve the issue quickly for me and give me a gift card for the my troubles.  One month later, still nothing received from the store - no phone and no call.  Contact them, to receive another promise to address the issue quickly.  Contact them a week later, and ask that they just give me my refund, which they did.  Please do not purchase phones from walmart.  They are not capable of successfully enabling phones for use.  Obviously this is a market that they should stay out of; until they are totally capable of understanding the processes that need to happen for the phones they are selling to work properly.

I mentioned Tracking #, to which she replied, I can find your order number by tracking # (Great Active listening skill). She found order #, she found information on the missing order items, she gave me all the information on each item, and now with order number, I can track. She was efficient, she was gracious, she was professional, and she was simply wonderful to communicate with. Hats of for a great customer experience!  Happy New Year!

headline: I wish I could give walmart 3 1/2 stars
review_content: walmart isn't always the cheapest place but I do really like shopping there.  The website is a mixed bag though.  I like using the website because you can order online and pick up at a local store if it's in stock, which I do often.  I've had a couple of problems when I've picked up though.  I ordered a health and beauty product, which was supposed to be in-stock.  When I picked up my order they hadn't retrieved the right item and when I went to look for it, they didn't have anymore.  I got a refund but was disappointed because I wanted the product.  Our local walmart is also very busy and they often have limited front counter staff so it can be a long wait.  They are usually very polite and helpful though but it can sometimes be a half hour wait to pick up with one person working the customer service desk (they're handling returns, exchanges, pickups, etc).  So, while I really like walmart, I have to plan ahead if I use walmart.com.

She should have offered to send me the rug I originally ordered in the larger size at no additional cost in exchange for my returning the incorrect rug; however, she refused to do so. The supervisor supposedly set up a UPS pickup for the wrong rug but it has been sitting outside my door for three days now. I called customer service once again and the representative made me repeat everything I had said during my last call. Apparently the supervisor never scheduled the UPS pickup. To top it all off, the representative informed me that I have to call back AGAIN tomorrow because there was no supervisor available at the time to schedule a UPS pickup. walmart's customer service has been HORRENDOUS in this situation. You would think a billion dollar company could offer a better solution to keep a loyal customer.

Even though I feel it would be a waste of time I prefer to voice my complaint in writing.  Due to health issue I find it necessary to shop on line.  Therefore, all shopping is done somewhere else.  I won't bother wasting my time again with walmart.

headline: I order from wedding registry at …
review_content: I order from wedding registry at walmart.com. I placed the order the beginning of the week. The next day I saw the e-mail that when my order was at the store I would get an e-mail to come pick it up. I was busy the next day and forgot to check. The next day I did and found an e-mail sent later in the day from the day before saying my order was in and I had to pick it up before the store closed the next day. The same night the e-mail was sent 2 others were sent in the middle of the night. One was sent at 2:30 a.m. saying it was my last reminder that my order was in and needed to be picked up. Six minutes later there was an e-mail stating my order was cancelled. I thought wait, today is Wednesday and the store is not closed. I called the 800 number and wow that was ridiculus. I was told well just go to the store and maybe they have what you ordered in stock. I called the store and was told that they only hold it 48 hours. I said that it wasn't even 24 hours from when I got notified. She said it looked like it was in stock and said she would find it and said she would have one brought to the service desk and I could pick it up the next day. I wanted to know if she could let a manager know so this doesn't keep happening. She said no they have nothing to do with walmart.com and I should just call them back. I tried and it was like talking to a rock. When I went to pick up the order, first they couldn't find everything. The gentleman who waited on my was nice. I told him I didn't think I would order form walmart.com again. He told me he did not blame me and they receive numerous complaints. He warned me to check the registry because many times what is purchased comes off but mysteriously pops back in the wedding registry and the bride and groom receive numerous duplicates which is frustrating for them. NEVER walmart.COM !!!!

headline: While at the Harrisonburg
review_content: While at the Harrisonburg, Virginia walmart Store that my wife and I have been shopping at since it's opening, this is our most recent experience.

headline: I shopped the walmart at Vernon Hills …
review_content: I shopped the walmart at Vernon Hills last week and had the worst experience with an employee.  I have been recently diagnosed with celiac disease  (gluteen intolerance). I was looking for the gluteen free aisle like other grocery stores have and being new to the area I was not familiar with this walmart. I proceeded to ask an employee by the name of Moe which was extremely rude and was on his personal phone. He seemed annoyed that I was interrupting him or something. He proceeded to show me where to go but his customer service skills were lacking. By that time I was not interested so I walked out. I will never go back to that walmart!

headline: walmart Broken Glass Coffee Table Customer Injury
review_content: It was our first experience to order from walmart.com, and the WORST online purchase experience ever. Stay away from this place if you can! We ordered a glass top coffee table. When it arrived, the glass top was broken into pieces and the broken glasses cut through my husband's fingers and caused him bleeding when he tried to open the package. It could be much worse if he was not able to hold the box soon enough, I cannot imagine the whole broken glass would have fallen on him and caused more serious injury.

headline: Very poorly customer services in …
review_content: Very poorly customer services in Sparks, Nevada. Needs more training or communication. One employee said one thing another one said something different very confusing.

headline: Just had my first experience with …
review_content: Just had my first experience with shopping online at walmart and I hope someone is listening because it Sucks.  The website is clunky, it does not easily update the shopping cart, requires way too many clicks and worst of all, it requires registry before checking out which means loads of junk emails hawking everything from dishes to dish soap. Speaking of junk mail, since signing up ten minutes ago, four emails from walmart, imagine that. All this to replace a twenty dollar lamp I stupidly knocked off the bedside table last night - Grrrrr!

headline: I am so disappointed in the service I …
review_content: I am so disappointed in the service I received over the phone today. I called the customer service department asking for a price match for the Apple® Watch Series 2 42mm that I just ordered online from walmart back on back on 7/5/2017. I received an email from walmart that they are offering this watch for $70.00 off. I was hoping to get a $70.00 credit for the watch but was told that I couldn't get it because of a 14-day price matching period. I had no knowledge of the price matching timeline. I spoke to a supervisor pleading my case in hopes of being accommodated because it has only been four days after the 14-day price match period. This watch is not cheap and I am a student.  I have been shopping at walmarts for years and because of this incident, I feel a little different about what I buy the next time at this store.

headline: walmart does not pay rebates when they mess up.
review_content: walmart does not stand behind their employees that make mistakes and cost the consumer money. When you choose to buy from walmart please be aware of discount and rebate gimmicks that cause to not to get your rebates. They then bounce you around to various departments and never provide you with the information you requested. When the associates make a mistake inputting your information they do not stand behind their employees and correct the wrong and the consumer suffers. When you ask to confirm what information was provided to them they tell you that they cannot disclose that to you. Yet still you know you did the right thing and followed all the rules when pre ordering a product.

review_content: Ordered a dress online had to ship to Bridgewater Falls, Fairfield Ohio store. Dress came in wrong size, so I reordered dress came in wrong size AGAIN. How hard is it to get the right size dress!!!! They only gave me a day to come pick it up also!! Absolutely ridiculous!!!

review_content: What horrible customer service. Sent my order back with out texting when order was available. Five hours of my time, multiple charges to my card with 7 days wait for charges to drop off the card????!!! I would strongly suggest buying at any other store but,walmart.

headline: Purchased ps4 controller about 10 days …
review_content: Purchased ps4 controller about 10 days ago and just got my package in the mail. Nice box with bubble tape inside to protect the glacier white controller $39.99. Way better service than Amazon. walmart all the way.

headline: great prices and delivery time
Great, fast, just shipping fee kinda high
review_content: Ordered on the 9th, shipped on the 15th through borderfee and arrived on the 19th. Faster than expected and very happy with my new Minecraft hoodie. The only thing I wish were different is the shipping fee of about 18 dollars for The Netherlands. Other than that, recommended.

headline: My favorite store!
review_content: I am so surprised that walmart has such a low rating on here! I love walmart, thankfully there is one quite close to my home. Every since I found walmart a few years ago, I stopped giving Walmart my hard earned money! walmart is a friendly, and organized environment. You get what you pay for, the cashiers, employees, and customers are so nice, and helpful! There is always someone who can help you, no matter how small the issue may be. They always run great deals in store as well! Like if you buy a certain amount in participating products you get a giftcard to walmart, which I love. They always have people at the cash registers, and they lines go fairly quickly! Their coupon policy is nice too. I shop in stores at walmart, and online too, all the time. Maybe 3-5 times per week. They offer a walmart credit card (that gives you 5% off, and free shipping online) that I have, I love it! It is a huge convenience for me. Something I ordered did not arrive, and I called walmart, and they send me a replacement with expedited shipping. The customer service was, and is so nice whenever I need help. walmart is my go to store, and I love to shop with them, they are so professional.

headline: Ordered Online - Never Got My Item - No Help From walmart
review_content: I've always loved walmart stores, but recently made my first and last purchase on walmart.com.  They insisted the item had been delivered to me, but it definitely was not.  I contacted both UPS and USPS and neither can help me.  I know the item was not stolen by a porch pirate because I was home all day and can hear everything outside my door at all times.  A company as big as walmart should at least offer to help me, but they will not.  So, I'm writing walmart off both online and stores.  I don't need to spend my money where they don't value their customers.

headline: Terrible should be thier name.
I was unable to use the …
review_content: I was unable to use the "informwalmart.com site, tried several times. My user ID is 7283 1796 4991 My password is 109 242. I wanted to tell you how impressed I was with one of your walmart cashiers at the Perimeter walmart in Atlanta GA. (June 17, 2017)  The cashier's name is Tanika, and she was exceptionally patient and kind to a customer in front of me. The customer was elderly, and wheelchair bound. The customer had difficulty with her credit card and Tanika went above board in helping her. Tanika was calm collected and professional. I was so impressed, that I wanted to let you know what a wonderful walmart employee Tanika is. Please share my admiration with her. Sincerely, Andrea Peska

headline: DO NOT GO TO THIS walmart
review_content: DO NOT GO TO THIS walmart. The customer service here not only from the associates but the managers is beyond horrible. I went in to this store to return two items that were purchase a few days before. I went in with my items and my receipt thinking it was going to be easy. However once it was my turn at the customer service desk the associate was frantic and overwhelmed with trying to handle the service station all alone. But I figured she would be able to do my simple return. My original transaction did have two different tenders. It was tendered with a walmart gift card and then my redcard. Since my return was less than the amount charged to my card I told her I would want me returned amount to be placed on my redcard. She said no problem and began to adjust it, however after she tried to do it she realized she didn't know what she was doing and that her manager would be able to help me. She asked me to wait until the manager came up which I was more than willing to do. After waiting around 10 plus minutes a manager finally came up her name is Rita. From the second she got there she was extremely rude and unprofessional she told me she would not be able to do override the option on the pos system and she would only be giving back a gift card. So I asked her to return all my items in the forms of payment I paid and than I would buy the additional three items that I am keeping. She than informed me she was not going to do that because I need the items to go into a bin for reshop. When I was just going to rebuy them. She said no she would need to but them in a reshop bin once again. Clearly she wasn't understanding me. I asked to speak to another manager and since there was no manager above her (so she said) I was directed to call the customer service number. After talking to the gentleman on the phone explaining my situation he asked me to get Rita in the phone. Well this time when Rita came back she made sure to bring a security guard with her. Like me a 125lb lady who wasn't even getting loud or causing a scene was going to do anything. I did not appreciate that and once again she proceeded to be extremely rude and not wanting to help me or listen to the gentlemen on the phone. After she repeated to the customer service agent on the phone that she was not going to be returning my items on my card she handed my phone back to me. I than continued my conversation with the gentleman he took my information down and I asked for a follow up call with the district manager. I ended up walking out without a return and I horrible horrible experience. Rita was rude, unprofessional, not understanding and is in need of training. I will not be returning to a walmart until I receive a follow up from corporate or the store manager. With the internet it is much easier to order online than to go to a store, and with an experience like this it will make me rethink of buying something from walmart when there is handful of other stores that I can shop with an be treated with excellent customer service.

headline: DO NOT ORDER ONLINE
review_content: I ordered a suit for my partner on a Saturday for a wedding the following Friday. As we needed to leave on the Thursday night I paid for express shipping so that it would arrive on the Tuesday, as stated on their website.

review_content: Do not create a wedding registry at walmarts. I did a wedding registry my guest ordered stuff from the registry for me and my husband. I went away for a few days on my honeymoon when I came to back to collect my gifts I was told by the store that all my gifts were canceled after two days of order if the gifts have not been picked up.

headline: The walmart employees have become very …
review_content: The walmart employees have become very rude over the past few years. They act like you're doing something wrong by purchasing bags at checkout. I'm paying the 10 cents for each bag, so it's none of their business how many bags I choose to purchase at checkout. They hover over you at self-check and assume you're trying to steal. The walmart culture has become so anti-customer service over the last few years. They take customers for granted, believing people will shop there, no matter how they're treated. The prices marked on the shelves often aren't the same as when you scan them at checkout. I've been shopping at walmart for over 20 years, and they have changed for the worse, particularly the ones in Temecula and Murrieta (Clinton Keith), CA.

headline: Big stores don't care about you - they make money regardless.
review_content: I ordered a cow print office chair and received it very quickly. That's where my great experience ends.

headline: We ordered a bookshelf LAST September …
review_content: We ordered a bookshelf LAST September (2016) & it arrived with a broken door, so I called customer service for them to please replace it. I waited, & waited & never received it so I called back only to be told the "ticket was closed" so they created another one. It is now almost June, I have spoken to walmart.com 11 TIMES over a door that I have YET to receive!! 😡 The incompetence at walmart.com is unbelievable!!! I will NEVER order from them again!!!

headline: 4 STRIKES
review_content: So far, I have placed four orders with walmart.com. Out of those four orders, all four were "delayed" for one reason or another. Of those four delays, two of them got completely dropped several days after the first estimated delivery date and before the second estimated delivery date. Upon reordering the first one that got dropped, I was told that the item had been mis-priced online, and now is no longer available at all from walmart.com. The second one arrived the very next day at the store after reordering...I am willing to bet it was there the whole time.

headline: I love walmart!
review_content: I love walmart!! I buy here regularly.  I always get my products and at a great price! I will always shop walmart.com!!!

headline: I had the worst online customer …
review_content: I had the worst online customer experience with walmart.com.  I was on the phone and live chat for over 2 hours to place one order.  The system kept telling me there was error when I was submitting my credit card and gift cards for payment.  After the chat didn't work, she sent me to the 800#.  After talking to the team member on that end, she offered my a 10% discount.  When I got to the supervisor, he would only offer 5%.  He stated that the system was having issues submitting a credit card and gift cards as payments.  It was not an issue with my credit card.  So you are telling me that because you are having system issues and I couldn't supply my Chat reference number, you would only offer 5% off. He didn't trust me that the other person offered a 10% discount. So you say I am lying over another few dollars.  It wasn't event the discount I wanted.  He is now telling me I am lying to him.  I am absolutely offended by this. He could care less I was upset and frustrated with my service I received.  He was saying the script he tells everyone.  I am so extremely frustrated, I will be blasting on social media how awful walmart.com is.  They have no regards to customer service and do not care about their end customers.  They will be out of business faster than they can blink an eye with Amazon's online customer service and satisfaction.  I will not shop at walmart.com AGAIN!!!  I used to work for walmart stores for 10+ years as a executive and never treated a customer like this.  Being in person is a total different experience, you can't hide behind the phone.  You should be ashamed walmart.  This is not the reputation you want.

headline: Worst return experience
review_content: One of the worst online shopping experiences. I checked out with PayPal on a few walmart orders recently, because the cc checkout was malfunctioning. As I was shopping, there was no warning as to 1) some items can only be returned in person to a store; and 2) PayPal payments will NOT be refunded to PayPal/original form of payment, but only as walmart Gift Card. CSR says there should have been a disclaimer along checkout (which she could not find to show me), but I never saw it. So as I tried to return things that didn't fit, I'm not getting any cash back, and with some items I have to return to the store (no such warning on the item page either). There seemed to be no rhyme or reason which items cannot be returned by mail. I'm disabled and that's why I shop so much online; this is incredibly inconvenient and disappointing. For the foreseeable future, I will avoid shopping any clothing or shoes at walmart.com - anything that may not fit, or anything you may have to see first!

headline: The most incompetent people work at walmart.com
review_content: I ordered a pair of shoes, they sent me the wrong shoes.  I wasted 20 minutes on the phone with customer service and was told I had to return them via mail.  They sent me a shipping label that did not work, it literally said I did not have access to it.  Not wanting to carve 20 more minutes out of my work day.  I opted for their online chat with some idiot who kept asking me why couldn't I return it in the store, and who did I speak to and what item I was returning.  Annita literally had the logic skills of a three year old.  I saved the conversation because she was such an idiot it was offensive that she was allowed to online chat with anyone.  I had to call customer service again where I found out the first person I spoke to was incompetent and created the wrong shipping label. I spent another 20 mintues on this call. Everyone pretty much had a cavalier attitude, couldn't careless the quality control for walmart.com is disgustingly poor and had little regard for actually solving the problem.

headline: Mixed gender toys & clothes and transvestites in the bathrooms?! GTFO!
review_content: Mixed gender toy and clothes departments?! Gays and transvestites get to use the wrong bathroom?! GTFO!!! Support for pro-gay and feminist charities and organizations?! No more walmart for my family EVER IN LIFE. Crash and burn, walmart!

headline: I have been a walmart shopper for many …
review_content: I have been a walmart shopper for many years and will continue to shop there,i love walmarts can't understand about all this bad reviews.they always ship my item quick.so happy

headline: I have been a walmart shopper for many …
review_content: I have been a walmart shopper for many years and will continue to shop there, most likely.  However, my biggest complaint with the retailer is that they are dipping their toe into the e-tail pond halfheartedly.  So many times when I attempt to redeem coupons and special offers via their site and via mobile in-store, I am met with confusion and disorder.  They need to get it together!  What a mess. Such a major retail chain should have a better handle on their online environment!

headline: POOR Customer Service
review_content: POOR Customer Service.  I have never felt so unimportant as a customer than when I called in for a resolution to walmart.com.  I spoke with three different men, all of whom treated me like I was less than. They kept quoting policy and never actually listened to what I was trying to say.  I was offered a price adjustment of $13 that should have been $28 and by the end of the conversation, they indicated they could no longer honor any price adjustment.  I asked who in customer relations I could speak with and was told that they "don't take calls."  This experience has me seriously doubting if I will continue shopping with this store.  SO disappointed right now.

We approach this lady and she told me it's only for 10 items and below I don't even saw a sign saying that . I also work at a retail but I don't mind if customer has more then item allowed  instead of her telling me it's ok I have to turn around and fall in line again that is rediculous. She should know better not to turn down customer.

review_content: I love this company!!

review_content: walmart used to be my favorite store.

review_content: Not sure why all the bad reviews.. My favorite place to shop

headline: walmart vs WalMart
review_content: walmart is a JOKE!!! I called on walmart for 3 years and they wanted to compete with Walmart pricing. ALL Manufactures spend over 70% more at Walmart to drive volume at a lower retail price than at walmart. walmart hires entry level category manager's that have know idea what they are doing and are incapable of building a business in the meat department. Then they hire a guy from Safeway in the Northwest to run it (Alex). This guy is an idiot (in my opinion). The stupid gal running the packaged meat department came from a convenience store corporate office (Quick Trip). She has know idea what she is doing. They are going down in Flames, just look at what happened in Canada............same is happening here now. This was a once thriving business, now just a shadow of what it use to be. As long as they keep hiring people that a, are rejects from other companies, they will continue do dismiss. It was nice to have walmart at one time...so enjoy it why you can. Center store solid, perishable a complete disaster!!!!!!!!!!!!!

headline: Unbelievably time consuming
review_content: I got a new RedCard in the store while trying to buy patio furniture. The man in the store was great in suggesting the RedCard as I would not only save 5%, but would get free delivery. So, I went online and found the stuff I wanted, put it all in my cart, and when I went to check out- since I only had a temporary pass, couldn't pay for the stuff (and therefore not get the extra 5% off). So, I called the number on the website, who gave another number for the credit card group, who said "no, not us" and shifted me back to someone else (so, now I've made three phone calls), I finally get a lady on the phone, who STILL CAN'T LOOK UP MY NEW CARD NUMBER, and says she can have me pay with a different card, and just refund the 5%, so (by now frustrated), I said ok. 31 minutes and 51 seconds later (yes, my phone times the calls), I was able to order 4 simple things. I already had the walmart acct filled out, so they had my name, address, etc. Literally, almost 32 minutes to order a deck chair and 3 cushions. Will NEVER do this again.

headline: Incompetent People and Service
review_content: There are two issues with my recent experience shopping at walmart.  First, I tried to order one item that I needed in a rush.  We were going to a hockey game and needed something for my son to soften the loud noises at the arena since he is only a few months old.  I ordered a Hush Hat and paid extra to make sure it was shipped to my house in 2 days.  I ordered it on a Tuesday and by Thursday I had not received the item yet, which was concerning because I needed it before the afternoon Friday.  I called Thursday to check on the status (it had said it was currently in Utah and had not been shipped yet), and after the woman verified what I had told her, she said that if I did not receive the item by Friday, I should call back to receive a refund on my shipping costs.  This first was unacceptable to me because it was already late and I should have been refunded on Thursday.  Needless to say, it did not come, and it ruined our plans to go to the hockey game because we could not take our infant son.  We lost money on the tickets we purchased because we could not find a babysitter to watch our son while we went, so we did not go.  They did manage to promise to refund my money, but the item I purchased is now useless, so I have to take the extra effort of going to return it.

headline: horrible and despicable place
review_content: I will never go there again, the quality of their items are cheap Chinese junk and the customer service is the worst I've ever seen. The bathroom was filthy and had used condoms on the floor and some strange man kept giving me creepy looks in the bathroom. I was shocked and horrified and I just can't believe it. The prices are way to high and the store had a weird smell to it.

headline: If you don't complain you may never get a refund
review_content: I ordered 2 items - had to return them.  Took calling walmart to get the "release #" for a shipping label.  Return items recieved on 1/10 - I had the tracking number and proof of delivery.  I have not received my refund.  I sent an e-mail on 1/23 - no reply.   I called today (1/26) and they said the refund was pending and that refunds take 3-5 days after the item is received back - WRONG.  The operator said she would release the payment today.  Let's see when I get my refund.

headline: Cheap and useful for some things
review_content: If you need tools or basic sporting equipment then this is the place. Make sure you buy with your credit card to increase the warranty though! The tools my husband bought here have lasted for years at a fraction of the price they were in the DIY store.

headline: Charged for "free" gift
review_content: I ordered online to be picked up at the store. There was a free gift if I spent $20. I spent $30. Picked up my purchase the next day. No free gift. Didn't care since I didn't want it anyway. A few days later my card is charged again for said free gift that they were shipping to my house.   When I called walmart about it they told me that my free gift charge was actually for the discount of the main purchase. There was no discount or anything explaining this.  And they won't let me return anything. Big scam

headline: Worst experience ever with an online purchase
review_content: On November 28, I ordered a kitchen aid for my daughter-in-law; I was told it would be on backorder I received 3 emails informing the dates for delivery had changed & asked for approval which I replied immediately. This past Sunday 01/01/17  I received another email that the item was on its way yay!  Today 01/04/17 I received an email that my item was returned due to lack of stock; they allowed orders for items they couldn't produce this in my eyes is false advertising. I called spoke to two different Supervisors and all they could do was give me a $20 gift card for my inconvenience. For me this is unacceptable and I will never place a walmart.com order again:(

headline: LOUSY  SERVICE
review_content: I PLACED AN ORDER ON LINE ON DEC 23D. 2016.  RECEIVED AN E-MAIL THAT DATE OF DELIVERY WAS DEC 30TH. I NEVER RECEIVED MY ITEM. CALLED THE 800 NUMBER AND WAS TOLD THE ITEM WAS BACKORDERED. SPOKE WITH SUPERVISOR AND MY ORDER COULDN'T BE CANCELLED AS THE SHIPPING  DOCUMENT WAS PREPARED FOR UPS. CALLED BACK  ON THE 30TH AS UPS HAD NOT RECEIVED  MY ORDER FOR SHIPPING.   A REPLACEMENT ORDER WAS PREPARED FOR SHIPMENT TO UPS. AS OF TODAY, JAN 3D. 2017 UPS HAS NOT RECEIVED MY ORDER. THE SCHEDULED DATE OF DELIVERY IS NOW JAN 5TH.  ORDERING FROM walmart.COM ISN'T WORTH IT.

headline: The product was not shipped
review_content: I don't want to give any star to this company but I haven't had a choice. This company is the worst! I ordered something as a Christmas gift that supposed to be delivered by December 20th, walmart NEVER shipped the item and I dint know until the person to I bought the gift for told me that he never get it. I called to walmart Customer service and they told me that they will ship it now, I said I prefer to pick up from the store, they told me that wasn't posible, so I said my money back and they told me that I will get the money in 10 days. Seriously? What a horrible company! Amazon guaranty the delivery day, how I could trust walmart.com? I'm never to order nothing from this company again.

headline: Registry nightmare
review_content: Their items kept going out of stock! I had a registry for three months and a few weeks in I have four items left on my list that were actually available. I do not recommend registering here at all.

headline: DO NOT PAY TO HAVE THEM WRAP UR GIFT
review_content: If you have an order that you're getting sent to the house and it's a medium/large sized item, do not rely on the $6 gift wrap option to cover the box from the person so they don't see what it is before Christmas. Especially if you have little ones... I ordered a Keurig and paid $6 to get it wrapped so my mother wouldn't find out her Christmas gift, and it came to my house in an unwrapped Keurig box. If you have kids that believe in santa, the box WILL show the gift and they will know santa is not real. They said this is a common problem so don't even bother paying. I'll never order from walmart again since they did nothing to right this wrong by ruining my Christmas. I wish I would've just gone to the store, or not ordered from this company at all! I was a loyal walmart shopper, with the red card and the cartwheel app, weekly shopping trips to walmart, but after tonight, I'm done with them. They do not need to be anywhere near my bank account after showing me just how incompetent they are. If they would've told me about the 48 hour policy, I would've shipped it to my house for free. headline: walmart does not care about their customers!

Well I received an email shortly after my purchase informing me that there was a delay in my order and it will not make it to the store the date I received with my original order. The new estimated delivery date was 12/05/16, which was reasonable. Come Monday morning, I checked walmart.com to view the status of my order and I saw that my item left Dublin, California and was in progress. For some reason I did not receive a tracking number, nor was I able to click on the UPS link to see more information about the tracking of my package. I checked again that evening and it was at the same progress I seen that morning, so I figured that maybe I would pick it up Tuesday morning.

headline: Changes their price, customer looses

That's it - no discussion, no "our mistake, we will meet you half way", just it's cancelled, and if I want the item, to reorder it at the correct price.    Isn't changing the price and/or terms of a purchase item after it has been ordered and acknowledged by both parties considered fraud?     Can I do that with my job -- after I get my paycheck, send them a email back stating that I think they should increase my pay by 43%?   What a system.

headline: Racial Profile
review_content: On Wednesday August 24, 2016, I went to walmart in West Boca Raton Florida around 11:30 am to purchase a few items for my employer with the company’s credit card. I was dressed in a medical uniform that I've worn for the past 20 years. I have always shopped at this store to purchase gift cards, groceries, etc with my company’s credit card. I picked up my groceries, office supplies and 3 gift cards ($100/ $50/ $25) and headed to check out to purchase these items. Lenora was the cashier, who has seen me on numerous occasions and has checked me out several times. For some particular reason on this day she decided to ask me for an ID. She never asked to see the credit card I was holding in my hand nor was I given a chance to swipe the card. I did inform her that my ID does not match the name on the credit card since it was my company's credit card. I have used the same credit card to shop at this store on numerous occasions for the past 15 years. I have never had a problem in the past. She looked at me as if I were some type of criminal coming into walmart to purchase items and gift cards with a stolen credit card. She proceeded to say "I can't sell you these items" and without any explanation sent me to the service desk. As I'm standing there in dismay I also became confused since there were two caucasian women who had just made large purchases with their credit cards and they were never asked for their ID. Being a women of mixed decent that is Caucasian and Black American, I began to feel as if I were being profiled by the color of my skin.

headline: Called guest services 3 separate times

She put me on hold and asked me to call back an hour later when they received the email with the screenshots because they apparently couldn't adjust the price. So I called back after I got the confirmation email, a different supervisor was super rude and told me they "couldn't find the email and that it would take up to 48 hours to process the email." Apparently guest services can't access their own email accounts. After going back and forth and being put on hold for over an hour, I called again and got a different location. It was a "computer glitch" and walmart isn't liable for the price online. So not only did I call three different times, I was put on hold for over an hour.  Not impressed with how I was treated. Definitely reconsidering ever going to walmart again because of this horrible guest services experience. I can gladly take my business elsewhere.

headline: TV Fraud at walmart
review_content: I purchased a 55 inch Samsung UltraHD television at walmart in the Chicago area in November 2015. I did not open the television for several months as I planned to get it mounted and needed to arrange for that service.  Once I did and Geek Squad arrived to do the install,  and they opened the box (a box that was still perfectly sealed and she had to use a box cutter to open) inside was not the tv I purchased. Instead in the box was a 2011 Sony 46 inch USED television.  Dust still on it. No remote, no manual. I immediately called the walmart store where I purchased the television and indicated what happened.  The Geek Squad staff who open the box also spoke to the walmart manager to verify what happened and what was in the box.  I was told to bring the receipt to the store which I did.  Once at walmart, I was told that since the television was purchased months ago, past the date of the return policy, that they would not be able to give me the tv that I purchased or refund my money.  They local walmart security manager called the corporate office which made that decision.  I called the walmart Corporate guest relations too from the local walmart store and was told that there was nothing they would do since the return policy had expired. They suggested I call Samsung directly.

headline: What horrible experience with walmart.com
review_content: I misplaced an online order of a video game at walmart.com. I called the customer service number just in one minute right after I hit the submit button and requested to cancel. But they told me they cannot cancel it, although they would try. They let me wait for 4 hours and see if the request got through. However, after 4 hours, I received a message saying the item was just shipped to my home address. Ok, I started to wait for its coming. Until the expected delivery date, I received nothing. The tracking number provided is an invalid number. Then I called the customer service again. They told me the item was electronic delivery. I should have received an email. But I checked my email box carefully and I found no such a delivery message. They told me I should contact the game maker myself to check its processing. How am I supposed to contact the maker while I purchased the item from walmart?! Plus I don't have any contact information for the game maker either.  I called again and the supervisor got into and said she would resend me email with e-delivery of the item in just seconds. But I kept refreshing my mailbox still with nothing coming in. Then she let me wait for 4 hours again. Now it's 14 hours passed but my emailbox was still nothing from walmart!  Mind you that walmart charged me $4.00 extra cost for shipping. Either home delivery or email delivery did not happen. I am tired of calling again ang again. I am going to dispute this transaction and will NEVER shop at walmart.com again.

headline: walmart.com is TERRIBLE!
review_content: A few months ago, I ordered protein powder from walmart.com. They said it was in stock and will be ready for pick up. That was 9am. By 5pm when I didn't receive any notices I checked my email. No notices or texts which I signed up for to receive notification. After waiting until they almost were closed, I went in to see if my power was ready. Nope. walmart.com never sent my order to the store for pick up. I paid and waited and they kept the order. After giving my order number and showing my id, they went to the store shelf to bring me my powder. The manager did apologize but he told me what happened in that they were never notified of my order. Ok. So today I guess because I like punishment, I wanted the same type of powder but a different flavor. They do not have them at Walmart and it's nearly twice the amount at the grocery store. That is the ONLY reason I sought out walmart.com again. When I looked at the powder online it says it will be there in 4-7 business days; yet when I got to the check out page, it says in stock at the store! What in the world?? I called walmart.com. A man said yes they have it on the store shelf. Ok so why does it say 4-7 business days on the website. He says, Well you can pick it up in 4-7 business days. I say, WHAT?!! If it's on the shelf, you would it take so long for me to receive? I want it today! He says, Well you can pick it up today. I say, Good grief!! I thanked him and hung up. I called the store. They lady searched for me. No they do not have it on the shelf. Ok. Are you sure? She said yes I am standing right in front of the powders. We do not have that brand. Ok again. Thank you and I hung up. Since it's nearby I went to the store myself. It was sitting on the shelf. With an exasperated sigh I purchased the powder and left. Do not bother with walmart.com, at least not for protein powder!

I attempted to exchange the TV for a functional one which I figured would be a simple exchange in the stores. Boy was I wrong! I would call one store and they wouldnt have the TV so they recommend a different location in which their system says HAS multiple in stock. So I call another location, NONE of them have the TV! I proceed to spend several hours PER DAY callin customer service, sometimes holding for hours at a time, trying to get this TV shipped to a location near me for exchange. It has been over 3 weeks of this very annoying, dissatisfying, and unbelievable debacle just to exchange a TV. I have still been unsuccessful!! Worst company I have ever dealt with! I always had great confidence in my walmart experience over the past 20 years, but this has completely changed my outlook, I will never recommend nor shop at any walmart location again. Terrible!

The invoice showed a different 2 wrong items. I held for customer service 30 minutes. They "fixed" it by sending me two more WRONG items. In fact, one was the previous wrong item, sent again (which is not even listed on their website as for sale). I called and spent another 40 minutes, told by the rep, Mike, he would issue a refund for the last 2 wrong items. Before he could complete the refund his "system froze". He transferred me to another department which was in fact --back into que for the same line I held on, previously!! Absolutely ridiculous. Hey walmart, there's a service that has this on-line shopping thing down, they're called AMAZON and I'll be cutting up my RedCard and using Amazon from here on out.

headline: Should not offer an online service.
review_content: I ordered two items from walmart.com, received the confirmation, shipping information and my card was charged. Five days later I received and email stating one of my items was out of stock. Funny how they can confirm the items and give me a shipping date all while charging me, and suddenly its out of stock. However I had one more item to arrive in 5 days. Unfortunately the next day I received and email stating my order was delayed and to approve the delay. Went onto my walmart.com account and saw the delay was not one or two weeks but a month and a half past my original arrival date. I cancelled my order. walmart should not have an online service because obviously the don't know how to operate one. Very disappointed in there service and will no longer be shopping with them. I contacted the company and I'm awaiting the response as to why they can confirm and charge me for an order then cancel and delay. Completely ridiculous!

headline: walmart online
review_content: On black Friday I went online and ordered a Wii u which walmart confirmed my order and debited my credit card for the purchase. Five days later I receive an email from walmart telling me that they did not have the item in stock and for my trouble they would send me a $50 gift card. The Wii u I had purchased was a black Friday special and I could have gone to Wal-Mart which I was already at and got my Wii u but I decided to get it at walmart. The only gift my 10 year old has asked for is this game system. Now I have looked online and can not find the game system that was on sale at any stores or online. I have tried to contact walmart several times today and no one will call me or answer the phone to help me or respond to my email. I think this is very poor custmer service especially around Christmas. If someone has purchased something online and got a confirmation on that item then the store should have to stand by it. What walmart has done is unacceptable $50 gift card or not.

headline: horrible return policy and service
review_content: I just left walmart in Norfolk Va at Broadcreek Shopping center where I waited in a very slow and long line to then be told that because the item I purchased was an electronic (antenna) even though it had nor been removed from it's box and I had my original receipt they would not refund the $47.69 to my Visa card they had to give me a gift card because it was Nov 6th and I only had 30 days or until 10/26.  The front end manager came over and wouldn't credit my Visa either.  I took the gift card but called the "customer service" 800# from the store and told him detais in under 2 minutes.  He proceeded to put me on hold multiple times and ask me the same questions over and over again and at 19 minutes he said the gift card was the policy.  This is a horrible policy and horrible service.  After I begrudgingly spend that gift card I don't want anything else to do with walmart.  It used to be good place to shop but not any  longer.

headline: walmart.com-- WORST customer service i've EVER experienced
review_content: **VERY angry customer** I recently ordered a coffee table on 9/24 from walmart.com along with a couple other items for my new home. Everything in the order was delivered as promised except for the most expensive item in my order- the coffee table. The tracking label created for FedEx never went past the phase of “Shipment information sent to FedEx”. After multiple calls to the customer service department for walmart.com-getting transferred from person to person- I was told by a supervisor that they couldn’t do anything about it until it was past the delivery date. Frustrated, I wait another day for the item to be officially past the delivery date and call again. The customer service department, yet again, give me the run around. They said the item never even got sent to a FedEx location to be shipped out. The supervisor on call had promised she would follow up on the issue and give me a call after she investigates the situation further. I patiently wait until the end of the day for my call to get returned.. Never happened. Subsequently, I call again in the evening to follow up.  Spending over 45 minutes on the phone with customer service this time- I get told I need to be transferred to a higher-level customer service team member. Coincidently, it was a Sunday night and they had gone home for the evening. Having to call again the next day, finally get another supervisor on the phone to issue a replacement for an item that never even arrived. Coffee table gets delivered to my home (two weeks after original scheduled delivery date) and is DAMAGED. Call yet again. I was then promised an expedited replacement for the item and scheduled a date for walmart to pick up damaged item. One week later, I receive an email from walmart.com stating that the replacement delivery date has been delayed another TWO WEEKS. This puts the estimated delivery date more than 1 month after I had placed the original order. I have spent multiple HOURS upon HOURS during this 3-week span on the phone with customer service representatives and supervisors (no exaggeration). On the verge of tears from frustration, I am currently on hold with walmart.com customer service **call time thus far has been 1 hour and 10 minutes**. This is my 3rd call today. I was hung up on after 30 minutes the first call. Second call I spoke to a supervisor named Andrew who was SO rude and unprofessional towards me- his attitude alone made me never want to buy from walmart again. At this point I am just asking for a refund on the item because I am so fed up. End of story, “I cannot cancel the item or dispute the charge until a new tracking number has been created- therefore I am required to make ANOTHER phone call to customer service once item has been shipped to cancel the order in able to get a refund”. This has been the WORST customer service I have EVER experienced from a company. I will NEVER buy from walmart.com again and will be canceling my walmart credit card after this refund has been issued. I have never felt so disregarded and disrespected as a customer in my life.

headline: Rug purchase
review_content: I purchased a rug on sale and walmart sent me the wrong rug. walmart said my only option was to return the rug and repurchase it. Too bad said walmart. Makes no sense that they made a mistake and I am left paying more money to get what I originally ordered. I spoke to four different team members and a supervisor and got the same response. So disappointed that such a large company cannot see the flaw in this transaction. I will never order such a large purchase from walmart and will make sure others are forewarned.

review_content: Ordered a duvet cover at a really great price. It arrived before the expected shipping date. Couldn't be happier with my purchace.

headline: my order arrived really quickly from walmart.com
review_content: I didn't want to go to the store to shop. I found everything I needed at walmart.com. within a few days i had my order and the shipping cost was not too bad.

headline: Could improve
review_content: Love the walmart deals, but I don't love the organization of the site.  If a dress comes in 3 colors, why do I need to search for each entry separately?  Why can't I see all options at once?  Makes it a bit frustrating to navigate, but the prices do make it worth it...

headline: Good value for money
review_content: Good range of swimwear, and real cheap.

headline: walmart's online shopping experience is way off walmart!!!
review_content: Once a year I have to try online shopping at walmart to remember why I try to avoid it. Terrible experience every time.

headline: Website is slow
review_content: I actually had to "wait in line" (in que) to purchase products from their site.  Seems they would have the technology down for a comany this large.

headline: Good quality
review_content: walmart always seems to have good quality.  The only negative is customer support could be faster with a response.

headline: Fast Shipping, Good Quality
review_content: I was very surprised by how fast my item came.  I bought Pokemon SoulSilver and chose the cheapest shipping possible, and it arrived in two days!  Since I ordered it on a Friday, I never expected it to come so early.  Of course, the game was new, and therefore in good condition.  Although I thought I paid a bit too much for the game, I ended up with a wonderful shopping experience.

headline: Easy returns
review_content: had to return something that I ordered online...went to the store--no PROBLEM! Bravo!

headline: Enjoy cashbacks
review_content: found great promotions on games and books and buy through bing.com and get amazing prices!
